title: /run/user/$UID as fallback if XDG_RUNTIME_DIR is not set
body:
XDG mentions `/run/user/$UID` as the value for `XDG_RUNTIME_DIR`:
* https://www.freedesktop.org/software/systemd/man/latest/pam_systemd.html
* https://serverfault.com/questions/388840/good-default-for-xdg-runtime-dir/727994#727994

Archlinux, Debian, RedHat, Ubuntu, etc all use `/run/user/$UID` because they follow XDG:
* https://wiki.archlinux.org/title/XDG_Base_Directory

I found this while using podman-py on a minimal headless Debian server setup, where  `/run/user/$UID` was in use  but `XDG_RUNTIME_DIR` was not set.  The existing fallback in `/tmp` did not work.

comments.body: I added two unit tests and addressed all the requested changes.  And the tests all pass now.
